Title: Boot Initialization
Definition: The software shall initialize hardware and enter a safe operational state on startup.

Title: Command Processing
Definition: The software shall decode and execute received commands.

Title: Data Acquisition
Definition: The software shall acquire and buffer instrument data.

Title: Data Processing
Definition: The software shall process raw data into calibrated outputs.

Title: Memory Management
Definition: The software shall manage memory allocation and prevent overflow.

Title: Mode Management
Definition: The software shall control transitions between operational modes.

Title: Mode Tracking
Definition: The software shall implement a Tracking procedure

Title: Calibration Algorithms
Definition: The software shall apply calibration corrections to raw data.

Title: Error Handling
Definition: The software shall detect, log, and respond to runtime errors.

Title: Data Pool
Definition: The software shall store and make all parameters for data acquisition available through a dedicated data pool
Notes: All parameters are stored in a data pool
